name: Tellurian Inc. 8.25% Senior Notes due 2028
summary: Tellurian Inc. 8.25% Senior Notes due 2028 are debt securities issued by Tellurian Inc., an American natural gas company. Tellurian is focused on developing a portfolio of natural gas production, LNG marketing and trading, and infrastructure. The notes represent a debt obligation of Tellurian with a specified interest rate and maturity date.
